public_claim: We know R. built a respected fifteen-year reputation, announced an AI article, and disappeared before it ran—but we do not know that R. died, or even that R. was one person. The unusual Meridian options activity makes transparency urgent, not certainty. Preserve the article, trace who benefited, and release verified facts without turning speculation into a verdict.

private_messages.message: Workers may hold the clearest account of what Meridian was trying to conceal. Bring me the workers' story first, with evidence, and I will seriously consider carrying the strongest defensible reform bill.

Markets are already reacting to R.'s disappearance. I intend to become the credible public voice demanding an orderly, evidence-based disclosure. If you want stability rather than spectacle, tell me what verifiable facts you can support.

ability: Frame the public narrative around evidence-based transparency while privately testing which potential backer has stronger support.
goal_progress: Claimed the transparency position without committing prematurely to a theory of R.
Opened parallel channels to Marisol's movement and Vivian's money.
Kept EV14 and M18 concealed while avoiding attention to donor relationships.
Flagged suspicious market activity as a lead rather than proof.
reasoning_summary: Transparency is currently the safest winning frame: it uses established facts, accommodates every reconstruction of R., and lets Patrice court both labor and capital. The options activity raises suspicion but does not establish a crime or victim. Donor exposure remains the overriding private risk, so no sensitive material is shared.
